prompt: A studio portrait of two young East Asian adults standing back-to-back against a bright pink to white gradient backdrop. The photo features a Y2K nostalgic 90s teen magazine aesthetic with soft focus, film grain, and a glowing bloom effect. On the left, a young woman with long dark hair smiles gently at the camera. She wears a layered outfit featuring a light green graphic t-shirt over pink long sleeves, a short skirt, and chunky sneakers, and holds a smartphone in her hand. On the right, a young man with short dark hair looks excited with his mouth open, raising one fist in the air. He wears a baggy purple t-shirt with yellow trim, loose blue jeans, and a silver chain necklace, and also holds a smartphone. The camera angle is slightly high, looking down at the subjects.
